zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：高位震荡偏强运行
zh.content:
当前BTC/USD报价73650.06美元，24小时微跌0.29%，价格维持在20日均线73469附近上方运行，显示中期趋势仍偏多。尽管短线出现回调，但整体结构尚未破坏，多头依然掌握市场主动权。

从技术指标来看，MACD数值为1.15410并保持正值，反映市场仍存在一定上行动能。不过RSI数据缺失，无法进一步确认超买或超卖状态。结合近期波动区间观察，市场正处于高位整理阶段，方向选择尚未完全明朗。

关键支撑位关注73470美元附近的20日均线区域，其次为73600美元日内低点区域。若跌破上述位置，可能引发进一步回调。上方阻力位首先位于73960美元附近的日内高点，突破后有望测试更高整数关口。

交易策略方面，激进投资者可关注支撑位附近的低吸机会，并以均线失守作为风控依据。稳健交易者则可等待价格有效突破73960美元后顺势跟进。当前震荡格局下应控制仓位，避免在区间中部盲目追涨杀跌。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is trading at 73,650.06, showing a modest 24-hour decline of 0.29% while remaining above its 20-period simple moving average at 73,469.22. This positioning suggests that the broader short-term trend remains constructive despite recent selling pressure. The narrow trading range between 73,608.98 and 73,961.13 indicates consolidation, with market participants waiting for a stronger catalyst before committing to a directional move.

The moving average structure favors buyers as long as price remains above the SMA(20), which is currently acting as dynamic support. MACD stands at 1.15410 and remains in positive territory, indicating underlying bullish momentum. However, the absence of a signal line and RSI reading limits confirmation strength. Even so, the positive MACD value suggests that upside momentum has not fully dissipated, although momentum appears relatively subdued rather than aggressively bullish.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near the session low around 73,609, followed by stronger support near the SMA(20) region around 73,470. A decisive break below these levels could expose a deeper retracement toward the 73,000 area. On the upside, initial resistance sits near 73,960, with a sustained breakout above that level potentially opening the path toward higher psychological resistance around 74,500 and beyond.

Traders may consider maintaining a cautiously bullish bias while price holds above the 20-period moving average. Conservative participants could wait for a confirmed breakout above 73,960 before pursuing long positions, targeting higher resistance zones. Alternatively, short-term pullbacks toward support may offer favorable risk-reward entries if buyers defend those levels. Risk management remains essential, as a breakdown below 73,470 would weaken the current bullish structure and increase the likelihood of further downside pressure.
